anyOf.title: Has constraints
anyOf.description: Release defines constraints to filter applications.

anyOf.title: Has applications
anyOf.description: Release defines an explicit list of applications.

collectionName.description:
CollectionName is the name of the catalog collection artifact (e.g., "nkp-partner-catalog").
Defaults to the repository name.

tagName.description: TagName is the tag for the catalog collection artifact (e.g., "2.17", must be a valid OCI tag).

fileName.description: FileName is the name of the catalog collection artifact (e.g., "nkp-partner-catalog-2.17.tar").

collectionAnnotations.description:
CollectionAnnotations holds extra annotations to populate on the collection artifact (if any).
See https://github.com/opencontainers/image-spec/blob/v1.1.1/annotations.md

includeApplicationImages.description:
IncludeApplicationImages indicates if the output should include application container images
Defaults to false.

baseRegistry.description:
BaseRegistry specifies the registry path to use for fetching pre-built catalog artifacts.
Required when IncludeApplicationImages is true.

constraints.description: Constraints defines the constraints used to filter applications for this release.

applications.description: Applications is the list of applications (with versions) included in this catalog collection.

items.description: Release defines a single catalog collection release with its supported applications.

releases.description:
Releases is a list of catalog versions (most likely pointing to a specific NKP Version)
and their supported applications.

description: CatalogReleaseSpec defines the catalog release specification that maps NKP versions to supported applications.
